title: find_cached_or_scan refactor correctly unifies get/put cache logic
description: Extracting find_cached_or_scan (returns Option<NvmId>) from get_cached_or_scan (returns NvmId or NotFound) correctly unifies the cache-validation logic across get() and put(). A contributor might suggest 'put() should always scan to be safe.' That would regress to O(n) per write for repeated writes to the same key. The cache-with-label-validation is the right pattern for both reads and writes.
